peer.help.tag.en: Task type for routing (architecture, security, test...)

peer.help.context.en: Context file to send to peer

agent.use_hint.en: roll agent use <name>   — switch agent for this project
agent.use_hint.zh: roll agent use <name>   — 切换此项目的 agent

agent.list_hint.en: roll agent list         — show installed agents
agent.list_hint.zh: roll agent list         — 查看已安装的 agent

doctor.stale_plists_path.en: Path no longer valid, clean up with:

check_structure.pre_2_0_layout.en: This project uses the pre-2.0 layout (BACKLOG.md / docs/*). Roll 2.0 requires
check_structure.pre_2_0_layout.zh: 此项目使用 2.0 之前的老结构 (BACKLOG.md / docs/*)。Roll 2.0 要求

check_structure.run_migration.en: process artifacts to live in .roll/. Run the migration to upgrade:
check_structure.run_migration.zh: 过程文件放在 .roll/ 下。运行迁移命令升级:

shared.config_updated_with_new_entries.zh: 配置已更新，新增 %s 条目

shared.file_exists_and_differs.zh: 文件已存在且内容不同: %s

shared.run_this_from_the_roll_repo.en: Run this from the roll repo, or symlink bin/roll to PATH.
shared.run_this_from_the_roll_repo.zh: 请在 roll 仓库目录下运行，或将 bin/roll 软链接到 PATH。

shared.config_has_no_ai_entries_recreati.en: Config has no ai_* entries — recreating with defaults (backup saved)
shared.config_has_no_ai_entries_recreati.zh: 配置无 ai_* 条目，将重建（已备份）

shared.skipped_resolves_to_repo_refusing.en: Skipped ~/%s (resolves to repo — refusing to manage skills inside roll worktree)
shared.skipped_resolves_to_repo_refusing.zh: 已跳过 ~/%s（解析到仓库目录 — 拒绝在 roll worktree 内管理技能）

shared.skipped_skills_unknown_symlink_ta.zh: 已跳过 ~/%s/skills -> %s（未知软链接目标）

shared.skipped_skills_created_path_resol.en: Skipped ~/%s/skills (created path resolves to repo — refusing to write)
shared.skipped_skills_created_path_resol.zh: 已跳过 ~/%s/skills（创建路径解析到仓库 — 拒绝写入）

shared.skills_linked_in_skills_new_repai.en: Skills linked in ~/%s/skills (+%s new, ~%s repaired, -%s pruned)
shared.skills_linked_in_skills_new_repai.zh: 已在 ~/%s/skills 中创建软链接（新增 +%s，修复 ~%s，清理 -%s）

shared.creating_skill_symlinks_for_ai_to.en: Creating skill symlinks for AI tools...
shared.creating_skill_symlinks_for_ai_to.zh: 正在为 AI 工具创建技能软链接...

shared.tmux_not_found_installing_via_bre.en: tmux not found — installing via brew...
shared.tmux_not_found_installing_via_bre.zh: 未安装 tmux，正在通过 brew 安装...

shared.brew_install_tmux_failed_install_.en: brew install tmux failed — install manually: brew install tmux  brew
shared.brew_install_tmux_failed_install_.zh: 安装失败，请手动 'brew install tmux'

shared.tmux_required_but_brew_not_availa.en: tmux required but brew not available — install manually: brew install tmux
shared.tmux_required_but_brew_not_availa.zh: 缺少 brew，请手动 'brew install tmux'

shared.tmux_required_install_via_your_pa.en: tmux required — install via your package manager (e.g. apt install tmux / pacman -S tmux)
shared.tmux_required_install_via_your_pa.zh: 请用系统包管理器安装 tmux

shared.skipped_resolves_to_repo.en: Skipped ~/%s/skills (resolves to repo — check if ~/%s symlinks to roll repo)
shared.skipped_resolves_to_repo.zh: 已跳过 ~/%s/skills（解析到仓库 — 检查 ~/%s 是否软链接到 roll 仓库）

skills.check_ok.en: Skill catalog is up to date.

skills.check_drift.en: Skill catalog drift: %s differs from a fresh scan. Run 'roll skills generate'.
skills.check_drift.zh: 技能清单漂移：%s 与最新扫描不一致。请运行 'roll skills generate'。

skills.check_missing.en: Skill catalog not found at %s. Run 'roll skills generate'.
skills.check_missing.zh: 未找到技能清单 %s。请运行 'roll skills generate'。

skills.unknown_sub.zh: 未知的 'roll skills' 子命令：%s

skills.doctor_drift.en: ⚠️  guide/skills.md is stale — run 'roll skills generate'
skills.doctor_drift.zh: ⚠️  guide/skills.md 已过期 — 请运行 'roll skills generate'

status.loop_overview.zh: 所有项目 loop 状态%s

status.peer_call_timeout_killed.zh: Peer %s 超过 %ss 上限,已强制终止 (FIX-150c)

update.version_mismatch.en: Version mismatch: installed %s, expected %s — CDN propagation lag, clearing cache and retrying...
update.version_mismatch.zh: 版本不一致（已安装 %s，期望 %s），疑似 CDN 未同步，清理缓存后重试...

update.still_mismatch.en: Still on %s after retry — registry may not have propagated yet, try again in a minute.
update.still_mismatch.zh: 重试后仍为 %s，注册表可能尚未同步，请稍后再试。

update.upgrading_via_npm.zh: 正在通过 npm 升级...

update.upgrading_via_curl.zh: 正在通过 curl 升级...

update.npm_install_failed_check_network_.en: npm install failed. Check network/proxy and try again.
update.npm_install_failed_check_network_.zh: 安装失败，请检查网络/代理后重试。

update.curl_download_failed.en: Download failed. Check network/proxy and try again.
update.curl_download_failed.zh: 下载失败，请检查网络/代理后重试。

update.curl_extract_failed.en: Extraction failed. The downloaded archive may be corrupted.
update.curl_extract_failed.zh: 解压失败，下载的归档可能已损坏。

update.re_syncing_to_ai_tools.zh: 正在重新同步到 AI 工具...

brief.not_ready.zh: 暂不可发版 — %s 个阻塞项

build.parallel_dispatch.en: Parallel Dispatch: %s Actions running in parallel
build.parallel_dispatch.zh: 并行分发: %s 个 Action 并行执行

build.agent_done.zh: Agent %s [Action: %s]  ✅ 完成 (%s 个 TCR 提交)

build.merge_summary.zh: 合并: %s/%s 成功，正在合并...

build.ci_check_failed.zh: 本地 CI 检查失败

build.evidence_checklist.en: Evidence checklist (each item must have actual output)
build.evidence_checklist.zh: 证据清单（每项必须有实际输出）

build.tests_passed.en: Tests passed: paste actual test run output
build.tests_passed.zh: 测试通过: 粘贴实际测试输出

build.build_succeeded.zh: 构建成功: 粘贴构建输出

build.online_verification.en: Online verification: screenshot / curl output / log snippet
build.online_verification.zh: 在线验证: 截图 / curl 输出 / 日志片段

build.no_regression.en: No regression: verify at least one existing feature still works
build.no_regression.zh: 无回归: 验证至少一个已有功能仍然正常

build.gate_pass.en: All items have evidence → Can mark as DONE
build.gate_pass.zh: 所有项有证据 → 可标记为完成

build.gate_fail.en: Any item missing evidence → Gather evidence before passing the gate
build.gate_fail.zh: 任一项缺证据 → 收集证据后再过门

design.stories_created.zh: 已在 backlog 创建 %s 个故事

fix.fix_applied.zh: 已通过 TCR 应用修复

loop.orphan_recovery.zh: 孤儿恢复: %s 项已回退

loop.pr_inbox.zh: PR 收件箱: %s 个开放

loop.cycle_complete.zh: Cycle 完成: %s 个已构建, %s 个已跳过

loop.idle_exit.zh: 无待办项 — 空闲退出

onboard.stop_migrate_first.en: This project has legacy Roll structure (BACKLOG.md or docs/features/). Run 'roll migrate' first before onboarding.
onboard.stop_migrate_first.zh: 此项目还保留着旧版 Roll 结构（BACKLOG.md 或 docs/features/）。请先运行 'roll migrate' 再 onboard。

onboard.questions_group2.zh: 第 2/3 组: 定义范围

onboard.questions_group3.zh: 第 3/3 组: 隐私与偏好

onboard.q1.en: I see this is a %s project doing %s — correct?
onboard.q1.zh: 我看到这是一个 %s 项目，做的是 %s — 对吗？

onboard.q2.en: The main business domains look like %s — anything to add or correct?
onboard.q2.zh: 主要业务领域看起来有 %s — 有需要补充或纠正的吗？

onboard.q3.en: The key modules are %s — any missed or mis-identified?
onboard.q3.zh: 关键模块是 %s — 有遗漏或识别错误的吗？

onboard.next_step.en: Next: run 'roll init --apply' to execute this plan
onboard.next_step.zh: 下一步: 运行 'roll init --apply' 执行此计划
